---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: assignments
  sort: "date asc"
  fields: [title, date]
---

Welcome! Hello World!  
This is my portfolio for learning **R, data analysis, GitHub, and Quarto**.

## Course Lessons

- [Quarto Literate Analysis](assignments/a01_quarto_literate_analysis.html)
- Data Wrangling and Cleaning
- Data Visualization
- Functions and packages

## Course Practice Session

- Practice I
- Practice II
- Practice III
